name: IRC_IM_AUTO_FDBK_CONFIG
description: This table stores the automatic interview feedback request action configuration.

columns.Name: AUTO_FDBK_CONFIG_ID
columns.Comments: Primary key for this table.System generated.

columns.Name: STEP_ACTION_USAGE_ID
columns.Comments: Stores ID of the action usage at which the automatic interview feedback request is configured. Foreign key to IRC_LC_ACTION_USAGES_B table.

columns.Name: INCLUDE_RESUME_FLAG
columns.Comments: Stores flag configuration value for resume.Default value is'N'.

columns.Name: INCLUDE_COVER_LETTER_FLAG
columns.Comments: Stores flag configuration value for cover letter.Default value is'N'.

columns.Name: INCLUDE_ATTACHMNTS_FLAG
columns.Comments: Stores flag configuration value for attachments.Default value is'N'.

columns.Name: INCLUDE_INTERNAL_FLAG
columns.Comments: Stores flag configuration value for internal documents.Default value is'N'.

columns.Name: REQUEST_RATING_FLAG
columns.Comments: Stored flag configuration value for request rating

columns.Name: EXPIRATION_DELAY
columns.Comments: Stores the number of days before feedback request will expire.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: COLLABORATOR_RESP_TYPE_LIST
columns.Comments: List of selected collaborators based on the ORA_IRC_COLLABORATOR_RESP_TYPE lookup type, stored as comma separated values.

columns.Name: CODE
columns.Comments: Code is used for data migration purpose. This column will be populated with a GUID value to uniquely identify a row across environments.
